👷 Technician & Sales Performance Scorecard
This scorecard shows two groups: Technicians are tracked by Assigned Team Member. Salespeople (like Josh Fuit) are tracked by their name in the Tags field — meaning they touched/sold the job even if they didn't run it in the field.
